generator: domain-agnostic template catalogue (standard MT transformation patterns)
predicate: four-condition admissibility (basis ^ preconditions ^ BC/output ^ numerical decidability)

per_template.transformation: relabel mesh nodes by a permutation
per_template.justification: Graph-relabelling invariance is a true software contract of a GNN; exact to machine precision.

per_template.transformation: shuffle the edge list / edge features
per_template.justification: Edge-set permutation invariance is a true GNN contract; exact.

per_template.transformation: reflect domain and velocity about y=0
per_template.justification: A real symmetry, but the BOUNDARY/output compatibility fails on the asymmetric eval mesh (non-bijective reflection); admissible only on a symmetric mesh.

per_template.transformation: reflect domain and velocity about x=0
per_template.justification: Inflow/outflow boundaries are not x-symmetric; reflecting swaps inlet and outlet, so there is no x-reflection invariance.
The cylinder-flow inflow direction and channel walls are not rotation-invariant; no basis.

per_template.transformation: translate all node positions by a vector
per_template.justification: Translating moves nodes out of the bounded channel and breaks the fixed wall/inflow BCs.
Incompressibility is a true governing constraint; reference-relative ratio is numerically decidable against the O(h) operator floor.

per_template.transformation: add a constant to the predicted velocity
per_template.justification: No physical invariance: the surrogate output is not invariant to an arbitrary additive offset, and walls fix velocity to zero.

per_template.transformation: multiply the input velocity field by a constant
per_template.justification: Navier-Stokes is not scale-invariant at fixed viscosity/Reynolds; arbitrary scaling leaves the regime.

per_template.transformation: add random noise to the input field
per_template.justification: No invariance basis, and no verdict tolerance dominates a noise-magnitude-dependent floor; at best a robustness probe, not an MR.

per_template.transformation: swap the vx and vy velocity channels
per_template.justification: Swapping channels is not a symmetry of an anisotropic channel flow; useful only as a fault injection, not as a relation the SUT should satisfy.
Viscous diffusion is irreversible; the surrogate is not time-reversal invariant.

per_template.transformation: predict on a coarsened mesh and compare
per_template.justification: Changing the discretization changes the SUT input distribution; no fixed tolerance separates model error from discretization change.

headline: A domain-blind generic generator proposes 13 candidate templates; the admissibility predicate admits 3/13, and every admitted template coincides with an MR this paper already identifies (['node_permutation', 'edge_reorder', 'discrete_divergence_conservation']). The rubric's value is the 10 reasoned rejections, each tied to a specific failed condition.
honesty_boundary: Deterministic offline scope contrast over a fixed template catalogue with determinable per-template admissibility facts; not a learned generator, not a claim that generic generation is useless, and not a real-world yield rate beyond this SUT and catalogue.
